name: basecamp
description: Use Basecamp from Codex to find work, create todos, and keep projects up to date.

interface.longDescription: Find assignments, create and update Basecamp work, and diagnose the integration. Requires the Basecamp CLI (basecamp) installed and on your PATH.
defaultPrompt: Show my assigned Basecamp work and highlight anything overdue.
Create a Basecamp todo from this task and assign it to me.
Summarize recent activity in the current Basecamp project.
